  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
  2. AbstractTool

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.AbstractTool

Packages that use AbstractTool
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the core domain model for Anahata's context management system.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.adapter
Provides adapter classes for converting between the core domain model and the native Gemini API types.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.mine
Provides specialized "mining" utilities for extracting deep configuration and assets from the NetBeans IDE environment.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons
The central hub for all programmatically drawn icons within the Anahata ASI Swing UI.

  • Uses of AbstractTool in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider that return types with arguments of type AbstractTool
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<? extends AbstractTool>
    RequestConfig.getLocalTools()
    Gets the tools for this request, determined just-in-time based on the agi's configuration (local vs. server-side).
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider with parameters of type AbstractTool
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract String
    AbstractModel.getToolDeclarationJson(AbstractTool<?,?> tool, RequestConfig config)
    Gets the provider-specific JSON representation of a tool's declaration.

  • Uses of AbstractTool in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool that return types with arguments of type AbstractTool
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private Optional<? extends AbstractTool>
    ToolManager.findToolByName(String name)
    Finds a tool by its fully qualified name.
    List<? extends AbstractTool>
    ToolManager.getAllTools()
    Gets a dynamically aggregated list of all tools from all registered toolkits.
    List<? extends AbstractTool>
    ToolManager.getEnabledTools()
    Gets a list of all tools that are currently enabled and allowed to be sent to the model.

  • Uses of AbstractTool in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi with type parameters of type AbstractTool
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractToolCall<T extends AbstractTool<?,?>, R extends AbstractToolResponse<?>>
    Represents a request to execute a specific tool.
    class 
    AbstractToolkit<T extends AbstractTool<?,?>>
    Represents a collection of related tools, parsed from a single Java class.
    class 
    AbstractToolParameter<T extends AbstractTool<?,?>>
    A rich, self-documenting, abstract representation of a single parameter for a tool method.
    Fields in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi declared as AbstractTool
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final T
    AbstractToolCall.tool
    The tool definition that this call corresponds to.
    protected final T
    AbstractToolParameter.tool
    The tool this parameter belongs to.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BadTool
    A special tool implementation representing a tool that was requested by the model but was not found in the registered toolkits.
